title: Launch Packet Wizard
concept: A guided launch wizard for Blueprint authors that treats a Playground as a compact launch packet: source route, runtime, storage destination, and handoff result are assembled in a card grid with a contextual detail drawer, while saved Playgrounds and Site Manager remain available as side tasks.
focus: guided launch wizard as the primary model
card grid with contextual detail drawer
compact enterprise SaaS styling with thin borders
Blueprint author route and catalog decisions
side-task access to saved management and Site Manager
flows: Choose a launch route from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or .zip import, with route-specific inputs and constraints shown in the detail drawer.
Configure WordPress, PHP, language, older versions, network access, and multisite with reset and Save & Reload consequences visible.
Save a temporary Playground either in browser storage or to a local directory, showing progress and distinct resulting states.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds, including rename, delete, temporary-state warnings, and saved browser identity.
Browse the Blueprint gallery with category filters, search, a dense result list, selected Blueprint detail, Run Blueprint, and Inspect JSON actions.
Use Site Manager side-task tabs for settings, file browser, Blueprint editing, database tools, logs, export to GitHub, download .zip, and import .zip over the current site.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
